reviews.review_text:
(Translated by Google) Thanks to my colleague Fernanda, whose excellent work ethic and knowledge of the menu provided me with one of the best Mexican gastronomic experiences in Jackson, Michigan.

(Original)
Gracias a la compañera Fernanda con su excelente disposición para el trabajo, conocimiento del menú me brindó una de las mejores experiencias gastronómica mexicanas en Jackson Michigan.
Has the best food

Always has the best fresh ingredients. Staff is always respectful and make you feel like you're family. Food is always on point for the price. Can't say the same for the other location or rival restaurants.

(Translated by Google) Thanks to my colleague Fernanda, whose excellent work ethic and knowledge of the menu provided me with one of the best Mexican gastronomic experiences in Jackson, Michigan.

(Original)
Gracias a la compañera Fernanda con su excelente disposición para el trabajo, conocimiento del menú me brindó una de las mejores experiencias gastronómica mexicanas en Jackson Michigan.
My go to Mexican food in Jackson Michigan. Favorite for 15 years!

Typical of this Mexican, sit down style chain that has taken over  in south Michigan. You can find these anywhere between Detroit and Jackson..so far I’ve discovered. Always fast and generally pretty good.  I’ll be back again at one location when I’m craving Chile Relanos.  This location did well in my experience.

Ricardo WAS AWESOME 👌
He came to the table after some misinterpreted food issues and was so great!! He fixed what he could!! Was so kind and had a great personality!!
Thank you 😊
Ricardo is the best!! Always a great experience! Fun, friendly atmosphere and service. Great food and ice cold beer!

Always a great time.
Thanks Ricardo, awesome service as always!

I placed a to go order tonight at 8:30 pm. The restaurant texted me and said my order would be ready at 9:03 pm. I sent my adult nephew in at 9pm to get the order. 20 minutes later, they still hadn't brought out the food. The guy manning the bar and the to-go orders was so busy flirting with these 2 chicks that he ignored us for 20 minutes. I even had to call out to him and wave to get him to even acknowledge my presence. When he finally came over, without the food, he gave the excuse that they were busy. I'm sorry but aside from the 2 chicks at the bar, there was only 1 other couple there. They were NOT busy. Then, they finally brought out my food and I told them I would not be back because of the crappy service. A different waiter then said, as I was leaving, "see you tomorrow" and then started laughing!
Completely unprofessional!  Don't bother coming here. There are other Mexican restaurants in Jackson that have better food and will treat you much better!
Server never came back to check on or fix order

We have eaten there many times over the past 3-4 years. This was for Father's Day and a birthday with 13 people. I called ahead to ensure they could accommodate one table w 13 people, in the side room. Was assured they could. They cannot.

We spilled salsa on the table shortly after being delivered. We apologized and the waiter said he'd take care of it. He did NOT till asked a 3rd time and only after we had finished our meals.

One entree was not what was ordered. Requested a menu to ensure the correct item was ordered; never provided. When the re-order came through, it did not contain the correct side dish. Asked 3 times, never corrected.

Another entree required corn tortilla (gluten allergy). Asked 4 times, finally brought after most of the others had completed their meal and that entree had cooled off.

When all of this was summed up to the waiter at the end of the meal, we were told "my bad, boss".

We stated at the beginning of the meal that we were celebrating a birthday. Most of the guests had left by the time we sang happy birthday at the end of the meal. There was zero recognition of a birthday, which is not consistent with other times we've eaten/celebrated there.

We will go elsewhere.

It is VERY LOUD. I'm saying this being a person that is hard of hearing. They have people packed together so much that you can't hear anything because everything is so loud and you're literally bumping elbows with other people. I could -almost- get past that if it wasn't for the fact that when I walked into the bathroom, I walked into a LAKE of HUMAN URINE. At first, I thought they had just mopped it, but no. I nearly slipped and fell into a lake of urine in the bathroom. It got on my pants so it completely ruined me being there for my mother's 70th birthday. I  asked to talk to the owner so the hostess went and retrieved him, but due to the noise, I couldn't understand anything he was saying. After a few minutes of reiterating that the bathroom was a literal cesspool, I left.

I definitely do not recommend

I placed a to go order tonight at 8:30 pm. The restaurant texted me and said my order would be ready at 9:03 pm. I sent my adult nephew in at 9pm to get the order. 20 minutes later, they still hadn't brought out the food. The guy manning the bar and the to-go orders was so busy flirting with these 2 chicks that he ignored us for 20 minutes. I even had to call out to him and wave to get him to even acknowledge my presence. When he finally came over, without the food, he gave the excuse that they were busy. I'm sorry but aside from the 2 chicks at the bar, there was only 1 other couple there. They were NOT busy. Then, they finally brought out my food and I told them I would not be back because of the crappy service. A different waiter then said, as I was leaving, "see you tomorrow" and then started laughing!
Completely unprofessional!  Don't bother coming here. There are other Mexican restaurants in Jackson that have better food and will treat you much better!

When all of this was summed up to the waiter at the end of the meal, we were told "my bad, boss".

We stated at the beginning of the meal that we were celebrating a birthday. Most of the guests had left by the time we sang happy birthday at the end of the meal. There was zero recognition of a birthday, which is not consistent with other times we've eaten/celebrated there.

We will go elsewhere.

Always has the best fresh ingredients. Staff is always respectful and make you feel like you're family. Food is always on point for the price. Can't say the same for the other location or rival restaurants.

I’ve always loved your food and margaritas for many years.   However I went last week and the margarita was just weird obviously a change in recipe. I read online that tequila was changed to peach schnapps.  It was too sweet and just gross. I will give it one more try but if it’s the same we are out.  Very disappointed.

I’ve always loved your food and margaritas for many years.   However I went last week and the margarita was just weird obviously a change in recipe. I read online that tequila was changed to peach schnapps.  It was too sweet and just gross. I will give it one more try but if it’s the same we are out.  Very disappointed.

We have eaten there many times over the past 3-4 years. This was for Father's Day and a birthday with 13 people. I called ahead to ensure they could accommodate one table w 13 people, in the side room. Was assured they could. They cannot.

We spilled salsa on the table shortly after being delivered. We apologized and the waiter said he'd take care of it. He did NOT till asked a 3rd time and only after we had finished our meals.

One entree was not what was ordered. Requested a menu to ensure the correct item was ordered; never provided. When the re-order came through, it did not contain the correct side dish. Asked 3 times, never corrected.

Another entree required corn tortilla (gluten allergy). Asked 4 times, finally brought after most of the others had completed their meal and that entree had cooled off.

When all of this was summed up to the waiter at the end of the meal, we were told "my bad, boss".

We stated at the beginning of the meal that we were celebrating a birthday. Most of the guests had left by the time we sang happy birthday at the end of the meal. There was zero recognition of a birthday, which is not consistent with other times we've eaten/celebrated there.

We will go elsewhere.
